capacity_engine.description: LightGBM regressor predicting safe monthly repayment capacity

intent_engine.description: Change-point detection (ruptures PELT) on daily net cash flow

guardrail_engine.description: Hybrid hard-rules + LightGBM classifier for over-leverage detection

composite.description: Weighted combination of Intent (0.4) and Capacity (0.6) scores

latency.description: End-to-end scoring latency per customer (measured, not estimated)
